platforms.name: Whatnot
platforms.notes: Main sales channel. Live streaming format. UK audience.

platforms.name: Shopify
platforms.notes: Secondary sales channel. Less active than Whatnot currently.

brand.tone: Fair prices, no nonsense. Community-first. Anti-scalper.

red_lines.reason: Brand commitment to fairness. Wheels, lottery formats, and random-draw-for-prizes undermine trust.
Artificial scarcity (fake countdowns, false low-stock warnings) damages community trust.
SaveRoom exists to serve the community, not to flip at maximum margin.

product_categories.notes: Core product. Can sell quickly but higher buy-price risk.
Performing better than originally expected. Now a useful staple.
Can be useful if priced correctly. Still finding the right positioning.
Higher AOV items. Good for stream anchors.
Default should be simple bundle structures. Too many types slow streams down.
Community building tool. Not a revenue driver.
Strong stream anchor due to guaranteed-hit style appeal.
